name: io.github.demwick/polymarket-agent-mcp
description: Trade, analyze, and automate Polymarket prediction markets through AI — 48 tools for direct trading, market discovery, smart money tracking, copy trading, backtesting, risk management, and portfolio optimization.

environmentVariables.name: COPY_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Execution mode: 'preview' simulates trades in a local SQLite DB (default, safe for inspection); 'live' places real orders on Polymarket and requires all POLY_* credentials.

environmentVariables.name: POLY_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Polygon wallet private key used to sign CLOB orders. Required only when COPY_MODE=live. Never logged, persisted, or transmitted outside signed order bodies.

environmentVariables.name: POLY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Polymarket CLOB API key. Required only when COPY_MODE=live.

environmentVariables.name: POLY_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Polymarket CLOB API secret. Required only when COPY_MODE=live.

environmentVariables.name: POLY_API_PASSPHRASE
environmentVariables.description: Polymarket CLOB API passphrase. Required only when COPY_MODE=live.

environmentVariables.name: POLY_FUNDER_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Polymarket funder wallet address (proxy wallet) used for live trading.

environmentVariables.name: DAILY_BUDGET
environmentVariables.description: Maximum USDC the agent may spend per day. Used by BudgetManager to cap copy-trading exposure.

environmentVariables.name: MIN_CONVICTION
environmentVariables.description: Minimum conviction score (0–100) required before a copy trade is executed.

environmentVariables.name: CHAIN_ID
environmentVariables.description: EVM chain ID for Polymarket (137 = Polygon mainnet).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MCP Marketplace license key that unlocks Pro-tier tools (monitor, live trading, backtesting, portfolio rebalance). Optional — the server runs fully on the free tier without it.

environmentVariables.name: DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the SQLite database path. Defaults to a package-local file.
